results.title: Why Was BNP Leader Aslam Chowdhury's Candidacy Cancelled?
Political parties, Independent MP write to CJI on SIR, role of ECI
results.description: Twenty-three political parties and an Independent MP urge the Chief Justice of India to address election-related issues and ECI's role.

results.title: Seymour questions school lunch report findings
results.description: Associate Education Minister David Seymour. Photo: RNZ Lauren Crimp of RNZ Associate Education Minister David Seymour has questioned the Auditor-General's credibility after it raised alarm about the coalition government's school lunch programme.

results.title: Viral India’s Got Latent Clip: Samay Raina’s Old Misogynistic Joke Faces Fresh Backlash Online
results.description: The controversy has drawn comparisons with the recent Rs 370 biryani debate, reigniting conversations around misogynistic humour in comedy.
